title: Yuki's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Yuki plays peek-a-boo with her sleepy friends as bedtime approaches, discovering who's hiding behind blankets, curtains, and pillows before finding her own cozy spot to sleep.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where is Yuki? Behind the big blue curtain!

illustration.description: A little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes hiding behind a blue curtain with only her eyes peeking out, creating a playful peek-a-boo moment

pages.text: Who's hiding under the soft yellow blanket? Peek-a-boo! It's Teddy Bear!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes lifting a yellow blanket to reveal a brown teddy bear underneath, both looking surprised and happy
illustration.alt: Yuki finding teddy bear under blanket

pages.text: Where is Bunny? Behind the fluffy white pillow! Peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes moving a white pillow to discover a small white bunny hiding behind it, with surprise elements and playful concealment

pages.text: Now it's time for bed. Peek-a-boo, sleepy Yuki! Good night!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes tucked in bed with her teddy bear and bunny, partially hidden under cozy blankets in a peaceful bedroom setting

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: What color is the curtain Yuki hides behind?
questions.explanation: Yuki hides behind the big blue curtain!

questions.question: Who is hiding under the yellow blanket?
questions.explanation: Teddy Bear is hiding under the soft yellow blanket!

questions.question: Where does Bunny hide?
questions.explanation: Bunny hides behind the fluffy white pillow!
